posts.author: diakrino (Dan Puchalla)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Please add relative dates to all dates columns. E.g., “the first Monday of February,” “the fourth Sunday of every month”

What are you trying to achieve

This is a very basic functionality that is critical for me to use Monday.com to organize my company’s tasks. Every calendar app has had this functionality for decades. This easily allows people to organize their repeating tasks based on the particular rhythms of their organization. It doesn’t make sense to me that one has to use very complicated formulas or third-party apps to achieve something that should be basic.
